claim_boundary: This is an ATLAS3D mixed rotation/dispersion bridge proxy, not a disk BDVR activation, not A_gov_inferred, and not a per-galaxy tuned model.
falsification_rules: The bridge interpretation is challenged if fast rotators do not have higher median bridge_response_proxy than slow rotators.
The bridge framing is invalid if reported as disk A_gov_inferred or as a per-galaxy tuned BDVR coefficient.
primary_result: Computed ATLAS3D mixed-support bridge proxy for 260 early-type galaxies. Spearman(bridge, lambda_R)=0.951; Spearman(bridge, V/sigma)=0.939; Spearman(bridge, surface density)=0.408; median fast-rotator bridge=0.5507692307692309; median slow-rotator bridge=0.18615384615384617.
warnings: ATLAS3D table supplies lambda_R and V/sigma, not a direct physical v_flat endpoint.
Stellar masses are K-band mass proxies using fixed M/L_K=0.8; use as a proxy only.
S_K_proxy uses one fixed coefficient globally, not per-galaxy tuning.
